name: coderec
description: Evaluation suite for coderec skill — tests layer outputs and gate verification against known codebase characteristics.

evals.description: Run cartography on a known repo. Module boundaries should match expected count and precedence levels.
All paths in CID resolve to actual files in SOT_ROOT.
Verbatim contracts in module cards match source at provenance anchors.
All CID files internally consistent — no orphan cards, deterministic IDs, all modules in disposition table.
Verify that all reads use absolute paths prefixed with SOT_ROOT.
